title: Junior train Wind Up Train Set, 8 pc
features: Wind up the trains, place on the railway line and watch the train choo choo around the track!
The Wind Up Train Set will help develop toddlers cognitive and motor development skills from an early age.
Create an imaginative railway play area for kids as they play make-believe, build their own train tracks, be the conductor and watch the wind up trains go and go!
description: Product Description Junior Train Wind Up Train Set, 8 pc This Junior Train Railway Set will take your little conductor on an educational adventure. Wind up the trains, place on the railway line and watch the train choo choo around the track! The Wind Up Train Set will help develop toddlers cognitive and motor development skills from an early age. Create an imaginative railway play area for kids as they play make-believe, build their own train tracks, be the conductor and watch the wind up trains go and go! Each Junior Train Wind Up Plastic Set includes: Assortment of colourful trains Railway train track All aboard kids! Recommended age 3+ years Directions Wind up the trains, place on the railway line and watch the train choo choo around the track! Safety Warning For external use only. See more
